query: I manually run the same 5-step report generation process every Monday. Automate it.
expected_behavior: Defines the tool's input schema (Zod) before writing any implementation
Defines the tool's output format (JSON or structured file) before writing any implementation
Produces a CLI tool or script that takes parameters as flags, not interactive STDIN prompts
The tool is idempotent: running it twice produces the same output without side effects
Includes a --dry-run flag showing what would be generated without writing files
